message:
deps: add gopsutil/v4 for cross-platform CPU monitoring

Adds github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v4 (and its transitive dependencies)
to enable programmatic access to system metrics. This will be used
by test utilities to detect CPU overload conditions and skip flaky
timing-based tests when the system is under extreme load.

Dependencies added:
- github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v4 v4.25.1
- github.com/ebitengine/purego v0.8.2 (transitive, for macOS/Linux)
- github.com/go-ole/go-ole v1.2.6 (transitive, for Windows WMI)
- github.com/tklauser/go-sysconf, numcpus (transitive, for sysconf)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
